scope.target: Remove the retired generated-script entry from the active .ai catalog and restore deterministic validation.
constraints: Do not restore retired generated scripts.
Do not scan src, tests, or product implementation.
Do not include the broader CTX-001 health audit in this task.
non_goals: No shell runner redesign or hosted Linux execution.

steps: Capture the baseline validator failure and confirm the path was intentionally retired by AIC-007.
Remove the stale scripts/generated catalog row.
Search active AI context for other claims that generated scripts remain active.
Run AI context, workflow/backlog, shell asset, and whitespace validation.
Obtain independent read-only scope verification and reconcile CTX-002.
execution.last_completed_step: Baseline failure confirmed and dedicated workflow branch created.
execution.next_action: Validate the workflow bootstrap, then remove the stale catalog entry.

results.residual_risk: The active AI context validator remains red until the stale catalog entry is removed.
